lines: Hello {player}! Can you tell me how you're feeling today?
Every feeling has a name. Let's find yours!
I'm so glad you came to visit me, {player}.
no_quest_line: You're doing amazing with your feelings, {player}!
quest_offer_line: I need your help with something important, {player}. Are you ready?
quest_progress_line: You're getting so close! Keep going, {player}!
quest_complete_line: You did it, {player}! I knew you could!
